candidate_definitions.text: Build, cache, and run CLI tools scoped in Cargo.toml rather than installing globally. Stop the version drifts across your team, keep it all in sync within your project!
Hardhat is a development environment to compile, deploy, test, and debug your Ethereum software.

An HTTP cache system, RFC compliant, compatible with @tyktechnologies, @traefik, @caddyserver, @go-chi, @bnkamalesh, @beego, @devfeel, @labstack, @gofiber, @go-goyave, @go-kratos, @gin-gonic, @roadrunner-server, @zalando, @zeromicro, @nginx and @apache
Distributed, in-memory key/value store and cache. It can be used as an embedded Go library and a language-independent service.
A service discovery plugin for Olric distributed cache, using nats.io
A high performance caching library for Go
Cache library with Redis backend for Golang
A simple extension that adds Kotlin Coroutines support to caffeine
A Transport for http.Client that will cache responses according to the HTTP RFC
🍻 A CLI workflow for the administration of macOS applications distributed as binaries
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.
🍻 A CLI workflow for the administration of macOS applications distributed as binaries
A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, RDMA, etc.
Annotate better with CVAT, the industry-leading data engine for machine learning. Used and trusted by teams at any scale, for data of any scale.
This repository hosts the source code of the Apache Ignite website deployed at https://ignite.apache.org.
HAProxy Load Balancer's development branch (mirror of git.haproxy.org)
Suite of tools containing an in-memory vector datastore and AI proxy
A set of cache abstractions extracted out of the Symfony components
🤖 Powerful asynchronous state management, server-state utilities and data fetching for the web. TS/JS, React Query, Solid Query, Svelte Query and Vue Query.
Simple key-value storage with support for multiple backends
:rocket: A high performance gin middleware to cache http response. Compared to gin-contrib/cache, It has a huge performance improvement. 高性能gin缓存中间件，相比于官方版本，有巨大性能提升。

a robust, scalable, and maintained set of caching packages
Finds the common standard cache directory
find-cache-directory — Finds the common standard cache directory
A shortcut action to cache Julia artifacts, packages, and registries.
A shortcut action to cache Julia depot contents to reduce GitHub Actions running time.

Redisson - Valkey & Redis Java client. Real-Time Data Platform. Sync/Async/RxJava/Reactive API. Over 50 Valkey and Redis based Java objects and services: Set, Multimap, SortedSet, Map, List, Queue, Deque, Semaphore, Lock, AtomicLong, Map Reduce, Bloom filter, Spring, Tomcat, Scheduler, JCache API, Hibernate, RPC, local cache..
Percas is a distributed PERsistent CAche Service.
Percas is a distributed persistent cache service optimized for high performance NVMe SSD. It aims to provide the capability to scale-out without pain and with stable performance.
FastCache: Fast Caching for Diffusion Transformer Through Learnable Linear Approximation [Efficient ML Model]
A high performance memory-bound Go cache
Fast thread-safe inmemory cache for big number of entries in Go. Minimizes GC overhead
Efficient cache for gigabytes of data written in Go.
Fast, concurrent, evicting in-memory cache written to keep big number of entries without impact on performance.

🗃  Generic cache use and cache manage. Provide a unified usage API by packaging various commonly used drivers. Support File, Memory, Redis, Memcached and more. Go 通用的缓存使用库，通过包装各种常用的驱动，来提供统一的使用API，便于使用。
An in-memory cache library for golang. It supports multiple eviction policies: LRU, LFU, ARC
